site.title: SPICYBEAN — Golf Headcovers with Attitude
site.description: Korean design-driven golf headcovers. Born for those who play with style.

hero.subtitle: Korean design. Studio craftsmanship. A statement on every tee.

series.title: The Collection
series.subtitle: Four series, one signature attitude. Every headcover tells a story.

k1.name: K1 — Classic Noir
k1.desc: Italian-inspired premium black pebbled PU leather. Understated elegance that speaks volumes.

k2.name: K2 — Signature White
k2.desc: Crisp white with a signature embroidered heart. Pure elegance that commands every glance.

k3.name: K3 — Spicy Red
k3.desc: Full-print vibrant red. Passion that burns with every swing.

k4.name: K4 — Cyber Skull
k4.desc: Cyberpunk limited edition. Carbon fiber PU texture. Our flagship ICON — born for the bold.

about.title: More than just a cover — It's the heat of your passion for the game.
about.p1: We believe golf is more than a sport; it's a stage for self-expression. SPICY BEAN transforms the fire behind every shot into bold, daring design.
about.p2: In your brightest moments on the course, we are right there with you. Ignite Your Passion.

material.title: Premium PU Leather
material.desc: Italian-inspired premium PU with deep color depth that defies time. Microfiber lining for superior scratch protection.

stitch.title: 60,000+ Stitches
stitch.desc: Double-layer embroidery with precision that rivals haute couture. Every stitch tells a story of craftsmanship.

design.title: Red Dot Award DNA
design.desc: Masterfully crafted by DBWD — a decade of excellence proven by the world's top 3 design awards (Red Dot, iF, DFA).

fit.title: Universal Fit
fit.desc: Compatible with driver (up to 460cc), fairway wood, hybrid, blade putter, and mallet putter.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, wholesale inquiries, or just want to say hi?

footer.designed: Designed in Seoul. Made with love.

social.title: Real Looks · Real Golfers
social.subtitle: See how players style their SPICYBEAN on the course
social.videoFallback: Your browser does not support video playback

material.title: Carbon Fiber PU
material.desc: Cyberpunk carbon texture, scratch-resistant with premium feel.

design.title: Korea Designer Signed Edition
design.desc: SPICYBEAN signature limited edition by Korean designer.
